title: koeleria vallesiana subsp. alpicola
intro: Koeleria vallesiana subsp. alpicola, also known as alpine Koeleria, is a subspecies of the Koeleria vallesiana plant, a type of grass that is native to mountainous regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help to soothe digestive issues and reduce oxidative stress. The health benefits of Koeleria vallesiana subsp. alpicola are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and protecting against cell damage. The plant is typically harvested for its leaves and flowers, which can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
